education.name: Mindanao State University - Iligan Institute of Technology (MSU-IIT)

positions.title: BS in Information Technology major in Database
description: Serving as the Tabulation Committee Chairperson for the School of Computer Studies Executive Council (SCS-EC).
Actively involved in full-stack and blockchain development within the Solana and Internet Computer (ICP) ecosystems.
Collaborating with technical teams and board members to manage student government data and digital infrastructure.
